steps.title: Compare the radii
steps.content:
Circle $A$ has radius $4n$, and circle $B$ has radius $148n$. The radius scale factor from circle $A$ to circle $B$ is
$$\frac{148n}{4n}=37$$

steps.title: Square the scale factor
steps.content:
Circle areas scale by the square of the radius scale factor.
$$37^2=1{,}369$$
The answer is D.
